subject: refactor(theme): migrate ImportModal, modals, QueryHelp, TimelineView to Tailwind
body:
Convert 7 more components/sections from custom CSS to Tailwind utilities:
- ImportModal + SmartMatchingStep (import flow)
- CreateNodeModal + ConnectNodeModal (shared modal classes)
- QueryHelpModal (fully eliminated CSS file)
- TimelineView (375→31 lines, pseudo-elements retained)
- MergeReview.css partial migration

Delete ~1,100 lines of CSS. QueryHelpModal.css fully deleted.
